summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each open PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with unique scoped work; no duplicate/supersession evidence and no allowed merge/fix path in this plan job.
Independent active Gateway diagnostics PR requiring maintainer technical review; no closeout basis.
Large independent contributor PR with unique behavior and review context; not eligible for closeout or merge in this plan-only inventory job.
Independent open PR with useful scoped code and failing/waiting-author signals; no boring duplicate, superseded, abandoned, or low-signal closeout evidence.
Independent first-time-contributor PR with a focused user-visible behavior fix; failing proof and bot-review context block merge-style handling, but there is no closeout basis.
